case_title: REINA AGUILERA RESPONDENT VS. ROSA VIDAL APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2007 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. (JPT JEFFREY S. ROSS, CLERK: V. MACK, NOT REPORTED, DEPT 525)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT VIDAL, ROSA TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT AGUILERA, REINA ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT ROSA VIDAL. ON CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF REINA AGUILERA. AGUILERA PAID A DEPOSIT OF $2,000.00 WHICH WAS NOT RETURNED BECAUSE OF REPAIR COSTS. VIDAL INCURRED COSTS OF REPAIR. NEITHER PARTY IS ORDERED TO THE PAY THE OTHER. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-13-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey Ross, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525.
12:15pm: Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent Reina Aguilera, appears in Pro Per; Appellant Rose Vidal, appears in Pro Per. Parties testify in the narrative. Judge Ross informs parties that the re-hearing was granted so Ms. Aguilera could come with an a Spanish interpreter. She appeared without one, and was told the hearing would go forward at 12pm if she could not one. The Court reviews a video tape as EXHR1 evidence from Ms. Aguilera.
EXHR1 2/5/08 correspondence from Ms. Aguilera
12:44pm
Matter is submitted, no new evidence is retained.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-19-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Defendant/Appellant Rosa Vidal present, with witness Sylvia Figueroa.
Plaintiff/Respondent Reina Aguilera present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo rehearing. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Defendant/Appellant Rosa Vidal testifies on behalf of herself.

Plaintiff/Respondent Reina Aguilera testifies on behalf of herself.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Jeffrey S. Ross, Clerk Vicki Mack, not reported (525)

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WEDNESDAY, NOV-07-2007: APPELLANT ROSA VIDAL APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR RESPONDENT REINA AGUILERA THIS DAY.

THE CAUSE IS ASSIGNED THIS DAY FOR SMALL CLAIM APPEAL IN DEPARTMENT 002, 575 POLK STREET.
THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO APPELLANT ROSA VIDAL.

THE COURT HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY APPELLANT MS. ROSA VIDAL AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IN THE CAUSE.

THEREUPON, AFTER HEARING ALL ORAL TESTIMONY AND AFTER CONDUCTING THE COURT'S OWN ORAL EXAMINATION, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

HON. PAUL H. ALVARADO; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-002, 575 POLK STREET).

RECORD ON APPEAL Court Judgment-Small Claims Appeal
Off Calendar Nov-07-2007 Set For Trial On Nov-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 002
